item.title: An Exciting Thames Find To Add To My Collection
item.description: How can a Thames find be ugly and beautiful at the same time!? Have a think and see if you can get the answer right before you watch this video! This one is probably the best one yet in my growing collection. A mudlarking permit from the Port of London Authority is required in order to mudlark on the River Thames.

media:content.media:title: An Exciting Thames Find To Add To My Collection
media:content.media:description: How can a Thames find be ugly and beautiful at the same time!? Have a think and see if you can get the answer right before you watch this video! This one is probably the best one yet in my growing collection. A mudlarking permit from the Port of London Authority is required in order to mudlark on the River Thames.

item.title: Unusual And Mysterious Finds: An Engraved Ring
item.description: We’ve found a ring featuring some engravings. A mudlarking permit from the Port of London Authority is required in order to mudlark on the River Thames.

media:content.media:title: Unusual And Mysterious Finds: An Engraved Ring
media:content.media:description: We’ve found a ring featuring some engravings. A mudlarking permit from the Port of London Authority is required in order to mudlark on the River Thames.

item.title: I Found All Of This In The River Thames!
item.description: An incredible find uncovered from the silt. A piece of historic chainmail is recovered, offering a direct link to ancient defensive armor. A mudlarking permit from the Port of London Authority is required in order to mudlark on the River Thames.

media:content.media:title: I Found All Of This In The River Thames!
media:content.media:description: An incredible find uncovered from the silt. A piece of historic chainmail is recovered, offering a direct link to ancient defensive armor. A mudlarking permit from the Port of London Authority is required in order to mudlark on the River Thames.

item.title: Finding Pieces of An Antique Mug Can I Put Them Together
item.description: An attempt to reconstruct a historic find from the riverbank. Scattered fragments of an antique mug are collected, matching patterns and edges to restore a glimpse of the past. A mudlarking permit from the Port of London Authority is required in order to mudlark on the River Thames.

media:content.media:title: Finding Pieces of An Antique Mug Can I Put Them Together
media:content.media:description: An attempt to reconstruct a historic find from the riverbank. Scattered fragments of an antique mug are collected, matching patterns and edges to restore a glimpse of the past. A mudlarking permit from the Port of London Authority is required in order to mudlark on the River Thames.

item.title: Discovering Hidden Treasures Mudlarking the Thames with the Ladies Who Lark
item.description: From historic tokens to personal trinkets, we reveal the hidden stories washed up by the tides. A mudlarking permit from the Port of London Authority is required in order to mudlark on the River Thames.

media:content.media:title: Discovering Hidden Treasures Mudlarking the Thames with the Ladies Who Lark
media:content.media:description: From historic tokens to personal trinkets, we reveal the hidden stories washed up by the tides. A mudlarking permit from the Port of London Authority is required in order to mudlark on the River Thames.

item.title: Mudlarking the River Thames London - A Mystery Object
item.description: A mudlarking permit from the Port of London Authority is required in order to mudlark on the River Thames.

media:content.media:description: A mudlarking permit from the Port of London Authority is required in order to mudlark on the River Thames.

item.title: Exquisite Thames Treasures!
item.description: A mudlarking permit from the Port of London Authority is required in order to mudlark on the River Thames.

media:content.media:title: Exquisite Thames Treasures!
media:content.media:description: A mudlarking permit from the Port of London Authority is required in order to mudlark on the River Thames.

item.title: Mudlarking The River Thames To Discover Plenty Of Royal Marines Buttons
item.description: A journey along the low tide of the Thames reveals a remarkable collection of Royal Marines buttons lost to the river over centuries. A mudlarking permit from the Port of London Authority is required in order to mudlark on the River Thames.

media:content.media:title: Mudlarking The River Thames To Discover Plenty Of Royal Marines Buttons
media:content.media:description: A journey along the low tide of the Thames reveals a remarkable collection of Royal Marines buttons lost to the river over centuries. A mudlarking permit from the Port of London Authority is required in order to mudlark on the River Thames.

item.title: Finding A Stash Of Jewelry!
item.description: We uncover the hidden gems buried beneath the silt. Every piece tells a story of the people who walked these shores. A mudlarking permit from the Port of London Authority is required in order to mudlark on the River Thames.

media:content.media:title: Finding A Stash Of Jewelry!
media:content.media:description: We uncover the hidden gems buried beneath the silt. Every piece tells a story of the people who walked these shores. A mudlarking permit from the Port of London Authority is required in order to mudlark on the River Thames.
